network.scope: scripts/georank_client.py may call only the explicitly selected GEOrank base URL and /api paths.
network.reason: Network access is required for the approved GEOrank management workflow and is constrained by base URL validation, API path validation, role checks, dry-runs, and confirmation phrases.

target_enforcement.openai: Run the local client only after base URL and action scope are explicit.
target_enforcement.claude: Run the local client only after base URL and action scope are explicit.
target_enforcement.generic: Run the local client only after base URL and action scope are explicit.
target_enforcement.vscode: Require workspace trust and an explicit GEOrank base URL.

file_write.scope: The client may create a missing parent directory, create a marked local session file, and replace or remove only a recognized marked session. It never changes permissions on an existing parent directory.
file_write.reason: An owner-only session file enables secure repeat authentication while avoiding tokens in command arguments, chat output, shell history, fixtures, and repository files.

target_enforcement.openai: Session writes remain local and use owner-only permissions.
target_enforcement.claude: Session writes remain local and use owner-only permissions.
target_enforcement.generic: Session writes remain local and use owner-only permissions.
target_enforcement.vscode: Session writes require workspace trust and owner-only permissions.

interactive.scope: The login command may request a password through getpass when the configured password environment variable is absent.
interactive.reason: A hidden terminal prompt supports ordinary-user login without exposing passwords through process arguments, terminal echo, generated reports, or saved fixtures.

target_enforcement.openai: Use a hidden prompt or reviewed password environment variable.
target_enforcement.claude: Use a hidden prompt or reviewed password environment variable.
target_enforcement.generic: Use a hidden prompt or reviewed password environment variable.
target_enforcement.vscode: Use a hidden prompt in a trusted terminal.
